name: task-github
description: GitHub provider adapter and compatibility facade powered by task-worker execution contracts.

interface.shortDescription: Project task-worker graphs into GitHub delivery workflows.
interface.longDescription: Uses task-worker as the provider-neutral execution engine, projects complete work graphs to GitHub Issue trees, and owns labels, pull requests, checks, review, merge, and closeout. Preserves existing task-github commands and Issue-first workflows while integrating wiki-markdown task bridge nodes when available.
defaultPrompt: Use $define to create a task-worker definition and choose local or GitHub recording.
Use $start to claim and load a legacy or projected issue.
Use $status to inspect current task state.
Use $orchestrate to run a GitHub issue tree in solo mode.
Use $done or $merge to close out work through gear-gated PR or FF merge paths.
